WITH stack_test_scores AS (
    SELECT 
        ms.version,
        ms.step,
        ms.test_score AS stack_test_score
    FROM model_score ms
    WHERE ms.model = 'Stack'
),
non_stack_max_scores AS (
    SELECT 
        ms.version,
        ms.step,
        MAX(ms.test_score) AS non_stack_max_score
    FROM model_score ms
    WHERE ms.model != 'Stack'
    GROUP BY ms.version, ms.step
),
problem_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.name,
        COUNT(*) AS total_occurrences
    FROM problem p
    J...

WITH stack_scores AS (
    SELECT version, step, test_score AS stack_score
    FROM model_score
    WHERE model = 'Stack'
),
non_stack_scores AS (
    SELECT version, step, MAX(test_score) AS max_non_stack_score
    FROM model_score
    WHERE model != 'Stack'
    GROUP BY version, step
),
violating_combos AS (
    SELECT ns.version, ns.step
    FROM non_stack_scores ns
    JOIN stack_scores ss 
        ON ns.version = ss.version AND ns.step = ss.step
    WHERE ns.max_non_stack_score < ss.stack_s...

WITH exceeding_versions AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        ms.step,
        ms.version
    FROM model_score ms
    WHERE ms.model = 'Stack'
      AND ms.test_score > (
          SELECT MAX(ms2.test_score)
          FROM model_score ms2
          WHERE ms2.step = ms.step
            AND ms2.version = ms.version
            AND ms2.model != 'Stack'
      )
),
